title: Enchiridion
author: Epictetus
content: “Some things are in our control and others not.”

title: The Upanishads
author: Various
content: “You are what your deep, driving desire is. As your desire is, so is your will. As your will is, so is your deed. As your deed is, so is your destiny.”
action: Align your daily input with your ultimate output.

title: Maxims
author: Heraclitus
content: “No man ever steps in the same river twice, for it's not the same river and he's not the same man.”
action: Accept the constant state of change.

title: The Epic of Gilgamesh
author: Anonymous
content: “The life you pursue, you will not find. When the gods created mankind, they destined death for mankind and retained life in their own hands.”

title: Laws of Manu
author: Manusmriti
content: “Action, born of thought, should be directed toward the good.”
action: Vet the intent before the execution.
